parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($json.sameApprover ? {status: 'pending_approval', fileName: $json.fileName, approveUrl: $json.approveUrl, rejectUrl: $json.rejectUrl} : {status: 'pending_approval', fileName: $json.fileName, awaitingApprover: true, approverEmail: $json.approverEmail}) }}

options.responseData:
✅
Decision recorded
You can close this tab. The system will process your decision automatically.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json: {status: 'auth_failed', message: 'Session expired after approval. Check your email for a new OTP code, submit it via the Search tab, then click Run Linkage (existing data) — or re-upload the file.'}}];
return [{json: {status: 'rejected', message: 'File was rejected. No data was uploaded or linked.'}}];
return [{json: {status: 'completed', message: 'Record linkage completed on existing data.'}}];
